boundary_note: This layer stays inside public evidence: metadata, duration, engagement, virality, release timing, corridor spread, and documented bias surfaces. It does not claim direct waveform physiology, biometric sensing, or universal emotional truth.
headline: The living media read gives the field 48/100 vitality, with 40/100 resonance depth and 23/100 centering pressure.

metrics.label: Kinetic energy
metrics.note: A public proxy for pace, drive, and release pressure built from virality, engagement, and duration fit.

metrics.label: Resonance depth
metrics.note: How deeply the field appears to land through repeated pull, communal carry, and engagement structure.

metrics.label: Cultural gravity
metrics.note: How heavily scale, official packaging, and familiar corridors are still organizing the visible market.

metrics.label: Bias resistance
metrics.note: A public-evidence resistance score built from corridor spread, genre breadth, parity, coverage confidence, and novelty room.

metrics.label: Vitality index
metrics.note: The composite read: aliveness through motion, depth, resistance, and reduced inheritance pressure.

bias_field.label: Centering pressure
bias_field.note: How strongly one dominant corridor is still centering the field.

bias_field.label: Representation lift
bias_field.note: A public representation read built from genre diversity and gender parity rather than subjective taste claims.

bias_field.label: Narrative entropy
bias_field.note: How much room remains for less inherited release shapes to register as more than noise.

bias_field.label: Documentation honesty
bias_field.note: How much the repository can prove about this field before the interpretation outruns the evidence.

bias_spectrum.label: Temporal bias
bias_spectrum.note: Higher when year coverage is thin enough to let one moment masquerade as a durable market truth.

bias_spectrum.label: Corridor bias
bias_spectrum.note: Higher when one cultural corridor keeps centering the field and shrinking what counts as visible success.

bias_spectrum.label: Aesthetic bias
bias_spectrum.note: Captures how strongly the field rewards a narrow duration and titling aesthetic rather than broader formal variation.

bias_spectrum.label: Cognitive bias
bias_spectrum.note: A public proxy for how much repeated packaging and winner concentration may be exploiting familiar attention heuristics.

bias_spectrum.label: Social bias
bias_spectrum.note: Higher when the field remains closed around inherited scale instead of circulating through broader collaborative routes.

bias_spectrum.label: Technological bias
bias_spectrum.note: Higher when platform-optimized packaging and official upload pathways dominate what becomes visible.

bias_spectrum.label: Somatic bias
bias_spectrum.note: Higher when one bodily invitation pattern keeps winning across a field that otherwise claims stylistic variety.

bias_spectrum.label: Epistemic bias
bias_spectrum.note: Higher when the explanation layer is tempted to outrun what the public rows, dates, and labels can honestly support.

origin_detector.label: Authenticity index
origin_detector.note: A public proxy for how strongly the field reads as community-carried and novelty-bearing rather than centrally over-shaped.

origin_detector.label: Organic signature
origin_detector.note: Higher when communal carry, novelty room, and language or genre spread are doing more of the work than inherited reach.

origin_detector.label: Engineered pressure
origin_detector.note: Higher when official packaging, reach concentration, repeat titling, and inherited scale keep organizing the visible field.

origin_detector.label: Velocity anomaly
origin_detector.note: Flags songs moving faster than community carry and recency context alone would suggest.

origin_detector.label: Distribution fingerprint
origin_detector.note: A public proxy for how optimized the distribution layer looks before anyone makes a claim about 'natural' breakout.

origin_detector.label: Longevity potential
origin_detector.note: Higher when resonance depth, communal carry, and lower anomaly suggest the field can survive beyond a first spike.

provocations.title: What looks alive because it truly moves people, and what looks alive because distribution keeps shoving it forward?
provocations.body: Right now Best Praise and Worship Songs 2021 - Top 100 Best Christian Gospel Songs Of All Time - Musics Praise sits near the front of the vitality field, but English · Latin still carries the heaviest structural gravity. The interesting question is not who won — it is what kind of life the system keeps rewarding.

provocations.title: Where does community carry become more important than inherited scale?
provocations.body: Tracks with stronger communal carry often travel differently from scale-heavy releases. That difference is worth following because it reveals whether social movement is opening the market or simply decorating the same concentration curve.

provocations.title: What kind of bias remains even after the explicit labels look better?
provocations.body: Representation can improve while corridor balance stays narrow. That is why the field map tracks centering pressure separately from genre and parity scores.

provocations.title: How much of the field is interpretable, and how much still needs more score, scene, or cultural context?
provocations.body: A living archive should admit its blind spots. The documentation honesty score is there to keep the repository curious instead of overconfident.
